import{createSlice,createAsyncThunk}from"@reduxjs/toolkit";import{GET_CATEGORIES}from'../../queries/queries';import{client}from"../../App";export const fetchProducts=createAsyncThunk('products/fetchProducts',async()=>{const response=await client.query({query:GET_CATEGORIES});return response;});export const plpSlice=createSlice({name:'plpProducts',initialState:{products:null,isLoading:false,error:null},extraReducers:builder=>{builder.addCase(fetchProducts.pending,state=>{state.isLoading=true;state.error=null;}).addCase(fetchProducts.fulfilled,(state,action)=>{state.isLoading=false;state.products=action.payload.data;}).addCase(fetchProducts.rejected,(state,action)=>{state.isLoading=false;state.error=action.error.message;});}});export const plpProducts=state=>state.plpSlice;// export const {  } = pdpSlice.actions;
export default plpSlice.reducer;
